ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "hypertension" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the patient has hypertension */,
  "heart_disease" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the patient has heart disease */,
  "ever_married" TEXT /* Flag indicating whether the patient has ever been married */,
  "work_type" TEXT /* Type of work the patient is engaged in */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Type of residence the patient lives in */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratory_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the result belongs to */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of laboratory test performed */,
  "glucose_level" REAL /* Glucose level of the patient */,
  "bmi" REAL /* BMI of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the patient */,
  "cholesterol_level" REAL /* Cholesterol level of the patient */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time the test was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laboratory_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking status record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the record belongs to */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "quit_date" TEXT /* Date the patient quit smoking (if applicable) */,
  "quit_reason" TEXT /* Reason the patient quit smoking (if applicable) */,
  "cigarettes_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of cigarettes the patient smokes per day (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_smoking_status_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the plan belongs to */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment plan the medication belongs to */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the medication */,
  "refills_remaining" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining for the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the appointment belongs to */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., follow-up, new patient) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the vaccination belongs to */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date the vaccination was administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical condition */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the medical condition */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_conditions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
